sigWerErrors.reason: 'shoot' is an interjection added at the beginning, but it does not change the meaning of the sentence. It just adds an exclamation.
Changing 'it is got to be annoying' to 'that is got to be annoying' does not significantly change the meaning of the sentence.
Repeating 'just' as 'just just snoring' is a minor repetition and does not change the meaning.
'alright' was split into 'all right', which is an acceptable variant and does not change the meaning.
